variables.notes: Selected the explicit revenue line from the candidate list.
No clear cost of goods sold / cost of sales line is present in the Income Statement preview. 'Gross profit/loss' is a subtotal, not COGS, and should not be selected.

candidates.why: Clear SG&A-type overhead component; administrative expenses are standard SG&A.
Likely selling/commercial overhead rather than direct production cost; appears as an operating expense component.
Could represent operating overhead bucket; included only as supporting SG&A component, not a total.
Share-based compensation can be part of SG&A overhead and is explicitly allowed when reported separately.

variables.notes: Candidate list was empty, so rows were chosen from the full preview. These appear to be the best SG&A/overhead components. Manual review is needed because 'Commercial preparation costs' appears twice in the source preview with the exact same label across different years, making coverage by label potentially ambiguous.
